title: Remove default dev/pts
body:
This allows us to run buildah without being root

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
```
cat ~/Dockerfile 
FROM fedora
RUN echo hello
```
```
id 
uid=3267(dwalsh) gid=3267(dwalsh) groups=3267(dwalsh),10(wheel) context=unconfined_u:unconfined_r:unconfined_t:s0-s0:c0.c1023
```
```
 ./buildah bud --net=host ~/
STEP 1: FROM fedora
Getting image source signatures
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:e71c36a80ba912dd7a5a9f2f2d6136c148afa19bc7d024bd616b74a0bc7a2774

Storing signatures

hello
STEP 3: COMMIT containers-storage:[vfs@/home/dwalsh/.local/share/containers/storage+/run/user/3267/run]@94f057525b74621db1b8b002166be617a73ee11ee77062aaaaaecb3264544264
Getting image source signatures
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:891e1e4ef82ad02a4ea1f030831f942d722c7694c4db64ca3239c8163b811c58
Skipping fetch of repeat blob sha256:4f4fb700ef54461cfa02571ae0db9a0dc1e0cdb5577484a6d75e68dc38e8acc1
Copying config sha256:2f5099516d2ad3e32b69027e94aefb3fc7cb9872c6cbb6776b69216150984647
 1.56 KiB / 1.56 KiB [======================================================] 0s
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 94f057525b74621db1b8b002166be617a73ee11ee77062aaaaaecb3264544264
```
This (essentially dropping "gid=5" from the mount options) shouldn't be necessary if GID 5 is mapped into the container.

It would be nice to force --net=host when running as non root, until @giuseppe figures out a way to setup network namespaces in rootless mode.  But running buildah this simply as non root is very cool.

> This (essentially dropping "gid=5" from the mount options) shouldn't be necessary if GID 5 is mapped into the container.

There is an issue in runc where it still complains if it detects when running in an user namespace (rootless mode) and there are not mappings in the OCI file.  This is a workaround for runc
Ok I will merge and we can revert when runc is fixed.

:pushpin: Commit 5498b06 has been approved by `giuseppe`
